name: Ethan Winters
description:
Ethan Winters is a 33-year-old, blond-haired guy with no special qualities. He is originally from Los Angeles.
He has a wife named Mia Winters and a daughter named Rosemary Winters.
He died in the 7th part of the resident evil series, but lived on as a mushroom.
At the end of the 8th part he died due to many injuries ethan suffered.
creator: Ethanwintersslut
